component.name: TeXmacs
component.summary: A structured wysiwyg scientific text editor

description.p: GNU TeXmacs is a free scientific editing platform designed to create beautiful technical documents using a wysiwyg interface. It provides a unified and user-friendly framework for editing structured documents with different types of content: text, mathematics, graphics, interactive content, slides, etc.

ul.li: Use TeXmacs as a graphical front-end for many systems in computer algebra, numerical analysis, statistics, etc.
Save documents in TeXmacs, XML, or Scheme format and print them as PDF or Postscript files.
Convert easily to and from TeX/LaTeX and HTML/MathML. (Notice that TeXmacs is not based on TeX/LaTeX).
Rely on a rendering engine that uses high-quality typesetting algorithms to produce professional-looking documents for printing or presentations.
Write new styles and add new features to the editor using the Scheme extension language.
